element_introduction_order.element: Basic platforming (jumping with cable from helicopter)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: establishes movement mechanics in side-view perspective
primary threat type throughout platform segments
scattered throughout stages to sustain player
distinct gameplay mode requiring spatial reorientation
required to unlock doors and progress
recurring boss encounters before final confrontation

typical_relief_triggers: reaching safe zones between enemy clusters
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: intense and explosive with varied gameplay modes; alternates between side-view platform combat and top-down tactical sections; limited lives and continues create persistent tension

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduces basic platforming and handgun combat in 1996 setting; side-view perspective; manageable enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: transitions to 2032 setting; introduces overhead top-down segments with hostage rescue objectives requiring spatial puzzle-solving; weapon variety expands (magnum, shotgun, grenades)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Simon Phoenix teaser battles escalate; final cryo-prison confrontation; combined mechanics from all prior segments

notable_level_patterns.description: Primary level type: horizontal traversal with jumping, cable mechanics, 8-directional firing against gunmen; health/ammo scattered throughout; powerups increase survivability
Secondary level type: two segments in 2032; player must find and rescue hostages to unlock progression doors; maze-like movement with static grid positioning; requires spatial navigation planning
Simon Phoenix appears in short-lived teaser battles throughout game before definitive final boss encounter; escalating difficulty with each encounter
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Multiple encounters leading to cryo-prison finale

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Demolition Man (SNES)
